last_episode_to_air.name: Cradled
last_episode_to_air.overview: Cradled is a gut-wrenching horror about a young mother experiencing a breakdown.  Written by Nessah Muthy and directed by Chloe Wicks.

name: On the Edge
overview: A drama anthology that serves up a raw slice of real life in Modern Britain.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Drama anthology examining key perspectives of criminal justice.

episodes.name: Through the Gates
episodes.overview: Written by Georgia Christou and directed by Stella Corradi Through the Gates tells the story of Aimee (Ria Zmitrowicz) a woman who has spent most of her young, tumultuous life in and out of prison. Tessa (Wunmi Mosaku) is a disillusioned parole officer charged with the care of Aimee’s welfare after her release, living her own life of organised chaos, all under the watchful eye of her boss, Mark (Craig Parkinson).

episodes.name: A Mother’s Love
episodes.overview: Written by Janice Okoh and directed by Anwar Boulifa A Mother’s Love reveals the lives of single mum Josephine (Nadine Marshall) and her 11 year old son Ishmael (Keajohn Jennings Dillon) which are devastated when he witnesses a gangland crime on their estate and has to testify against the killer. Under threat, they find sanctuary in the middle class home of Josephine’s sister Claudia (Carryl Thomas) and her judgemental husband Patrick (Cyril Nri).

episodes.name: That Girl
episodes.overview: Written by Rose Lewenstein and directed by Dionne Edwards, That Girl centres around the friendship between Ashley (Chanel Cresswell) and Becca (Alexandra Roach). Rebellious Ashley refuses to grow up, encouraged by rational flatmate Becca. But, when she is forced to confront her past, Ashley’s life begins to unravel.

1.name: Season 1
1.overview: Drama anthology examining key perspectives of criminal justice.

episodes.name: BBW
episodes.overview: Remi is a young plus-size woman trying to find her place in the world while everyone around her thinks they know best. Will she ever be able to take back control?

episodes.name: For You
episodes.overview: Rev controls his mental health issues with therapy, medication and the help of his girlfriend Alex. But, at a family wedding, it all gets too much.

episodes.name: Adulting
episodes.overview: When vulnerable Candice moves into her own flat, she befriends down-on-his-luck Kems, who soon discovers Candice is not to be underestimated.

episodes.name: Mincemeat
episodes.overview: Mincemeat is a comedy drama about Jane, a young woman trying to cope with her controlling and over-bearing mother who struggles with hoarding. Will she find a means of escape when she falls for Nish? Written by Samantha O’Rourke and directed by Nadira Amrani.

episodes.name: Superdad
episodes.overview: Superdad tells the story of a road trip between a father and son, Keon and Wesley. However, Keon is supposed to be in a psychiatric hospital while Wesley is supposed to be in school…  Written by Daniel Rusteau and directed by Theo Krekis.

episodes.name: Cradled
episodes.overview: Cradled is a gut-wrenching horror about a young mother experiencing a breakdown.  Written by Nessah Muthy and directed by Chloe Wicks.
